title: ElementZ
description: A LevelZ addon for Minecraft 1.20.1 that aims to add compatibility for some uncommon mods.
body:
# Yo, its wekt, This is my first datapack, I will continue to update with time.

This pack aims to add compatibility for uncommon mods for the final 1.20.1 build of LevelZ.


The datapack currently has support for the following mods:
  
- Ice and Fire: CE
- Zenith
- Bountiful
- Yeleefff's Enderite
- Variant Furnaces
- Iron Chests: Restocked


Can I use this in my personal/commercial modpack?
- Yes.
